title: dmidecode
html:
dmidecode

File Write

It can be used to write files using a specially crafted SMBIOS file that can be read as a memory device by dmidecode. Generate the file with [dmiwrite](https://github.com/adamreiser/dmiwrite) and upload it to the target. - `--dump-bin`, will cause dmidecode to write the payload to the destination specified, prepended with 32 null bytes. - `--no-sysfs`, if the target system is using an older version of dmidecode, you may need to omit the option. ``` make dmiwrite echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file ./dmiwrite /path/to/temp-file x.dmi ```

dmidecode --no-sysfs -d x.dmi --dump-bin /path/to/output-file
